### Descendant

The `Descendant` is an extension of `DescendantOptions` .

```typescript
export type Descendant<T, K> = DescendantOptions<K> & {
    node: T;
    index: number;
    forceUpdate: () => void;
};
```
<b>参考：</b>[DescendantOptions](#descendantoptions)
